name: Any eBook Reader & Annotater
description: Read DOCX, PDF, EPUB, MOBI, and AZW3 eBooks with highlighting and note-taking.
content_security_policy: default-src 'self' blob: data:; script-src 'self' blob:; style-src 'self' blob: 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' blob: data:; frame-src blob: data:; object-src 'self' blob: data:
